name: Sinister invincible/sinister mark
description:
He's been destroying cities, murdering humans and heros, are you going to stop him?

Dead dove.

There is murder and sadistic themes in this bot.

had a lot of fun making this, like this is the most fun i had making a bot. And this bot did really good when I tested it.

You can be ANYTHING in this bot, be invincible, be whatever you want.

Also, largest amount of tokens of my bots yet, isn't that cool?

Btw, I think I'm gonna go edit my other bots, make them look cooler, like the text on this bot.

And I nearly got 69 followers, so thanks!
